title: Ukrainian Herbal Chicken Soup
description: A soothing, flavorful soup originating from Ukraine, made with fresh herbs and tender chicken.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the carrots, celery, parsley, and dill. Pour in enough chicken broth to cover the ingredients.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with additional parsley and dill if desired.
